name: Shock
summary: Body's circulation collapsing. Caused by severe bleeding, infection, burns, heart attack, severe vomiting/diarrhoea, anaphylaxis.

callEmergency.text: Call 999. Shock can lead to organ failure and death without treatment.

steps: Lay them flat. Raise their legs to help restore blood pressure.
Stop any bleeding with direct pressure (unless an object is embedded — see Severe bleeding).
Loosen tight clothing. Keep warm with blankets/coats — but no artificial heat.
Monitor airway and breathing until help arrives.

warnings.text: Don't give food or drink — they may vomit.
Don't use artificial heat sources (hot water bottles, heaters) — these draw blood away from organs.
